summary: Blackout Override | User Look up Page | UI Validation - with User Info Lookup
gherkin:
When the user visits the Operator tool and logs in
Then the user should be successfully logged into the platform
When the user clicks on the "Blackout Override" tile from the homepage
Then the user should land on the "User Lookup" page by default
And the user should see tabs for "Blackout Override"
* "User Lookup" tab
* "Overrides" tab
And the user should see "User Info Lookup" under the Blackout Override header
And the user should see "Search for a user by email to view their information, existing overrides and recent Conviva sessions"
And the user should see an email input field
When the user enters "dm5+tv@mlb.com" into the email search field
And the user presses the "Enter" key
And !xray-attachment://fd5f6bb7-d8ce-4520-b703-405178fa8979|width=1168,height=1376!
Then the user should see "User Info" data for the searched email
And the user should see the:
-ID
-Email
-First Name
-Last Name
And the user should see a section called Existing Overrides. If there are existing overrides, the page will display them, else you’ll see "There are no existing overrides for this user."
And the user see Conviva Session in an according style dropdown menu. See attached screenshot for reference.

steps.action: *When* the user visits the Operator tool and logs in
steps.result: *Then* the user should be successfully logged into the platform

steps.action: *When* the user clicks on the "Blackout Override" tile from the homepage
steps.result:
*Then* the user should land on the "User Lookup" page by default
*And* the user should see tabs for "Blackout Override"

* "User Lookup" tab
* "Overrides" tab

*And* the user should see "User Info Lookup" under the Blackout Override header 
*And* the user should see "Search for a user by email to view their information, existing overrides and recent Conviva sessions"
*And* the user should see an email input field

steps.action:
*When* the user enters "[dm5+tv@mlb.com|mailto:dm5+tv@mlb.com]" into the email search field
*And* the user presses the "Enter" key
steps.result:
*Then* the user should see "User Info" data for the searched email
*And* the user should see the:
-ID
-Email
-First Name
-Last Name

*And* the user should see a section called Existing Overrides. If there are existing overrides, the page will display them, else you’ll see "There are no existing overrides for this user."

*And* the user see Conviva Session in an according style dropdown menu. See attached screenshot for reference.
